label: Ritual outcome comp (room stat)
description: Scores quality based on a room stat (e.g. Impressiveness) at the ritual location, evaluated via a curve.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Not used directly; quality is computed from the curve evaluated at the room stat value.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: SimpleCurve mapping the room stat value (X) to quality offset (Y).

statDef.label: Stat def
statDef.description: RoomStatDef evaluated at the ritual location.
